expected_effect: Lift calm weak slices without continuous cheap quoting.
expected_failure_signature: The envelope behaves like a broad cheap-mode overlay and arb leakage spikes.
expected_win_condition: Lift low-retail and low-decile slices via short-lived calm-only release.
hidden_coupling_removed: Calm relief persistence and opportunity spend were tied together as a broad bucket or toggle.
rationale: Trigger bounded calm relief only after repeated benign confirmations, then decay it exponentially rather than leaving a bucket or broad rebate active.
title: Exponential calm-relief envelope
why_not_coefficient_retune: This replaces the bucket-style release path with a bounded confirmation-gated decay envelope.
